_readme: Watch URLs for the automated change-detection step in scripts/update.py.
Policy: OFFICIAL sources only — EUR-Lex, European Commission, national
government / ministry / parliament / official-gazette pages. No blogs,
no law-firm trackers, no commercial vendors.
The EUR-Lex NIM page is monitored globally for every country in addition
to the URLs listed here. Add national ministry or gazette pages per
country as you identify stable official URLs — deeper, more specific
pages give better change signals than portal homepages.
